zh.lifeSummary: 當Amelia De Warburton於大約1325年出生在英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓時，她的父親Geoffery de Warburton54歲，母親Margaret le Boteler49歲。她於大約1352年與Urian Egerton在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年在英國英格蘭享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amelia De Warburton于大约1325年出生在英国英格兰爾瓦布爾頓时，她的父亲Geoffery de Warburton54岁，母亲Margaret le Boteler49岁。她于大约1352年与Urian Egerton在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年在英国英格兰享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Amelia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A blend of two medieval names: Emilia (which is of Latin origin: see Emily ) and the Latinized Germanic Amalia . Henry Fielding is sometimes credited with having coined it for the heroine of his novel Amelia ( 1751 ), but forms such as Meelia, Amaly and Aemelia occur from the 17th century onwards.

en.lifeSummary: When Amelia De Warburton was born about 1325, in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffery de Warburton, was 54 and her mother, Margaret le Boteler, was 49. She married Urian Egerton about 1352, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1375, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amelia De Warburton est née environ 1325, à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffery de Warburton, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margaret le Boteler, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Urian Egerton environ 1352, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1375, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amelia De Warburton um 1325 in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffery de Warburton 54 und ihre Mutter Margaret le Boteler 49. Sie hat um 1352 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Urian Egerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1375 im Alter von 51 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amelia De Warburton è nata il circa 1325 nel Warburton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Geoffery de Warburton, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Margaret le Boteler, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Urian Egerton circa 1352, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1375, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amelia De Warburtonが約1325年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトンで生まれた時，父Geoffery de Warburtonは54歳，母Margaret le Botelerは49歳であった。約1352年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでUrian Egertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年にイギリスイギリスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amelia De Warburton(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffery de Warburton(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret le Boteler(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 대략 1352년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Urian Egerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amelia De Warburton nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffery de Warburton, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Margaret le Boteler, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Urian Egerton aproximadamente 1352, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1375, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amelia De Warburton родилась около 1325 г. в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffery de Warburton было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret le Boteler, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Urian Egerton около 1352 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1375 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amelia De Warburton nació aproximadamente 1325, en Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffery de Warburton, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Margaret le Boteler, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Urian Egerton aproximadamente 1352, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1375, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
